originalTitle: Here’s where you can preorder the new Oura Ring 5
summary: If you’ve been waiting for a smaller version of the Oura Ring, the company’s latest wearable is now available for preorder ahead of its June 4th release from Oura and various third-party retailers, including both Amazon and Walmart. The Oura Ring 5, which starts at $399, is 40 percent smaller than its predecessor, thanks to […]
content: If you’ve been waiting for a smaller version of the Oura Ring, the company’s latest wearable is now available for preorder ahead of its June 4th release from Oura and various third-party retailers, including both Amazon and Walmart. The Oura Ring 5, which starts at $399, is 40 percent smaller than its predecessor, thanks to a design that’s both slimmer and lighter. Oura also promises improved accuracy and battery life, letting you get up to nine days of use on a single charge. In addition to the aforementioned hardware changes, Oura is rolling out several new software features, including a Locate tool for finding a misplaced ring or charging case using Oura’s app. On the fitness front, the company is introducing a live activity mode for real-time workout and heart rate tracking, along with support for third-party heart rate monitors and new GLP-1 tracking tools. Oura also announced Health Radar, a system that monitors nighttime breathing and blood pressure patterns for signs of potential health issues, and partnered with Counsel Health to bring AI-assisted medical guidance to the app. We’re still testing the Ring 5, but if everything announced thus far has your attention, we’ve included links and pricing details below. Where to buy the Oura Ring 5 [Product: Oura Ring 5 | https://www.amazon.com/gp/aw/d/B0GRK1N94H/?tag=theverge02-20, https://goto.walmart.com/c/482924/565706/9383?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.walmart.com%2Fip%2FBk10-setup1%2F19971706119, https://bestbuy.7tiv.net/c/482924/614286/10014?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.bestbuy.com%2Fproduct%2Foura-ring-5-smart-ring-size-before-you-buy-with-or5-sizing-kit-size-13-silver-2026%2FCT296X7J8J] Beginning today, you can preorder the Ring 5 at Amazon, Best Buy, Target, Walmart, and Oura’s online storefront in either silver or black, starting at $399. Premium colors — including the gold, stealth, brushed silver, and deep rose variants — are also available from the same retailers starting at $499. Each model includes a size-specific charger and a USB-C cable, and, like prior iterations, is eligible for HSA and FSA reimbursement in the US. In terms of sizing, Oura’s latest smart ring is available in sizes 6 through 13 with a free sizing kit, which is helpful since the slimmer design means sizing differs from previous Oura Ring models. Like prior iterations, the ring works with both iPhones and Android devices, though you’ll still need an Oura membership ($5.99 a month / $69.99 a year) to access all of the platform’s health insights and features. Along with the ring, Oura is launching the Oura Ring 5 Charging Case, which supports wireless charging and can provide up to a month of battery life. It also sports an action button that lets you quickly pair the case and check charging status. Like the Ring 5, the case will hit stores on June 4th, though you can preorder it starting today at Amazon, Best Buy, Target, and Oura’s online storefront for $99.
chineseTitle: 您可以在这里预订新款 Oura Ring 5
chineseSummary: 如果您一直在等待较小版本的 Oura Ring，该公司最新的可穿戴设备现已可以在 6 月 4 日发布之前从 Oura 以及包括亚马逊和沃尔玛在内的各种第三方零售商处进行预订。 Oura Ring 5 的起价为 399 美元，比其前身小 40%，这要归功于 [...]
chineseContent: 如果您一直在等待较小版本的 Oura Ring，该公司最新的可穿戴设备现已可以在 6 月 4 日发布之前从 Oura 以及包括亚马逊和沃尔玛在内的各种第三方零售商处进行预订。 Oura Ring 5 的起价为 399 美元，由于采用更纤薄、更轻的设计，比前代产品小了 40%。 Oura 还承诺提高准确性和电池寿命，一次充电即可使用长达 9 天。除了上述硬件变化外，Oura 还推出了几项新的软件功能，包括使用 Oura 应用程序查找放错位置的戒指或充电盒的定位工具。在健身方面，该公司推出了用于实时锻炼和心率跟踪的实时活动模式，并支持第三方心率监测器和新的 GLP-1 跟踪工具。 Oura 还推出了 Health Radar，这是一个监测夜间呼吸和血压模式以发现潜在健康问题迹象的系统，并与 Counsel Health 合作，为该应用程序带来人工智能辅助医疗指导。我们仍在测试 Ring 5，但如果迄今为止宣布的所有内容引起了您的注意，我们在下面提供了链接和定价详细信息。哪里可以买到 Oura Ring 5 [产品：Oura Ring 5 | https://www.amazon.com/gp/aw/d/B0GRK1N94H/?tag=theverge02-20，https://goto.walmart.com/c/482924/565706/9383?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.walmart.com%2Fip%2FBk10-setup1%2F19971706119， https://bestbuy.7tiv.net/c/482924/614286/10014?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.bestbuy.com%2Fproduct%2Foura-ring-5-smart-ring-size-before-you-buy-with-or5-sizing-kit-size-13-silver-2026%2FCT296X7J8J]开始今天，您可以在 Amazon、Best Buy、Target、Walmart 和 Oura 在线店面预订银色或黑色的 Ring 5，从
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于 AI 与科技趋势信号，适合用于观察工具选型、产品机会、开发者关注点和技术路线变化。
